<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Select namespace"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"put"}
  path={"/v2/projects/{projectId}/import/result/files/{fileId}/select-namespace"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Sets namespace for file to import.
